title: Odyssey of the Stars
description: A great adventure that takes you from the depths of the earth, to the grand sea of the stars
body:
This modpack houses many fantasy and space themed mods, from orcs and dragons to star watching and planet hopping.

The pack has many mods that focus around fantasy, space, customization, and quality of life. There are many things to do, like run a village with MCA reborn, fight bosses from various mods, invent insane machinery with create, or build your way with bits and chisels!
